notes: has_colors/can_change_color and the COLORS/COLOR_PAIRS globals (set by start_color) report identical values to libncursesw for xterm (1 / 0 / 8 / 64) -- the color-init queries every colored TUI runs at startup.
oracle_method: link one has_colors/can_change_color/COLORS/COLOR_PAIRS C program against libncurses_cabi.a and libncursesw under an 80x24 xterm pty; compare the values
